create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field
create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add a page, and place a text box field in an AcroForm on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.title: Create PDF with Top‑Positioned Checkbox Field
create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add an AcroForm, and place a checkbox field near the top of the first page.

add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with an AcroForm and add a gender radio button group using Aspose.Pdf.

create-acroform-text-field-appearance.title: Create AcroForm Text Field with Font and Color Appearance
create-acroform-text-field-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box AcroForm field to a new PDF and customize its appearance, including font, size, text color, border, and outline color.

fill-pdf-text-field.title: Fill a PDF Text Field with a Value
fill-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, locate a specific text field by name, assign a string value to it, and save the modified document.

set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.title: Set Checkbox Field in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates the first checkbox form field, sets its checked state based on input, and saves the modified document.

select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.title: Select Radio Button in PDF Form
select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a radio button field, set its selected option, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.title: Select ListBox Option in PDF Form
select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates a ListBox form field by name, sets its selected option using a 1‑based index, and saves the updated document.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from Dictionary
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all form fields, and assigns values from a case‑insensitive dictionary of field names to the matching fields before saving the document.

read-pdf-form-field-value.title: Read PDF Form Field Value and Output to Console
read-pdf-form-field-value.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a named form field, exports its value to JSON and prints the extracted value to the console.

mark-a-form-field-as-read-only-to-preven.title: Mark A Form Field As Read Only To Prevent Editing After Initial Population

mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field by name, set its Required property to true so validation fails when empty, and save the updated document.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Form Field
add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field in a PDF and set its tooltip (alternate name) using Aspose.Pdf, then save the modified document.

set-default-value-for-pdf-form-textbox.title: Set Default Value for PDF Form TextBox
set-default-value-for-pdf-form-textbox.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextBox form field, and defines its default value and appearance so the text appears when the document is opened.

add-text-annotation-save-new-pdf.title: Add Text Annotation and Save Modified PDF to New File
add-text-annotation-save-new-pdf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds a text annotation to the first page, and saves the modified document to a new file, leaving the original unchanged.

save-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Save PDF with Incremental Updates to Preserve Form Revisions
save-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Demonstrates copying a PDF, opening it with read/write access, optionally updating a form field, and saving it using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update to retain prior revisions.

batch-fill-pdf-fields.title: Batch Fill Same Fields in Multiple PDFs
batch-fill-pdf-fields.description: Creates sample PDFs with a form field, then iterates over all PDFs in a folder and fills the same field with a specified value.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export the form data to separate XML files using XmlSaveOptions.

convert-form-json-to-csv.title: Convert Form JSON Data to CSV
convert-form-json-to-csv.description: Shows how to read form field data exported as JSON and transform it into a CSV file for easy spreadsheet import, with optional PDF‑to‑JSON export using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Saving
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's widget annotations, check that every required form field has a non‑empty value, and abort saving if validation fails.

create-pdf-absolute-acroform-textbox.title: Create PDF with Absolutely Positioned AcroForm TextBox
create-pdf-absolute-acroform-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to add an AcroForm text box field to a PDF and position it using absolute coordinates, including setting its default appearance.

create-acroform-textbox-relative-positio.title: Create AcroForm TextBox with Relative Positioning
create-acroform-textbox-relative-positio.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, setting page margins, computing a field rectangle relative to those margins, and adding a TextBox AcroForm field at that position.

extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.title: Extract XFA Form Data from PDF to XML
extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it contains an XFA form, retrieve the XFA data as an XmlDocument, and save it as an XML file for external processing.

import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load XFA data from an XML file and assign it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the filled document.

merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.title: Merge PDFs with Unique AcroForm Field Names
merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to load two PDFs, rename the form fields in the second document to prevent name conflicts, merge the pages, and combine the form fields into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields After Filling
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, sets values for specific form fields, flattens the form to make the content non‑editable, and saves the resulting PDF.

unflatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Unflatten PDF Form Fields to Restore Editability
unflatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to restore editable form fields in a previously flattened PDF by enabling AutoRestoreForm and making form annotations independent using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Form Field Label
rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field label, rotate its rectangle by 45 degrees, and save the updated document.

hide-pdf-form-field.title: Hide a PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf
hide-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to hide a specific form field in a PDF by setting its AnnotationFlags.Hidden flag with Aspose.Pdf and saving the modified document.

set-form-field-visible-non-printable.title: Set Form Field Visible but Non-Printable in PDF
set-form-field-visible-non-printable.description: Demonstrates how to make a PDF form field visible on screen while preventing it from being printed by clearing the Print annotation flag.

import-xfa-form-data-from-xml-string.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML String into PDF
import-xfa-form-data-from-xml-string.description: Shows how to load an XML string containing XFA form data and import it directly into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf without reading from a file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Pretty-Printed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields from a PDF document to a JSON file with indented (pretty‑printed) output using Aspose.Pdf.

import-compressed-json-form-data.title: Import Compressed JSON Form Data into PDF
import-compressed-json-form-data.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP‑compressed JSON payload, and import the form field values into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-different-acr.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Different AcroForm Fields
create-multi-page-pdf-with-different-acr.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with three pages, each containing a distinct AcroForm field (text box, checkbox, combo box) using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy Form Field to Another Page in PDF
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field and place the copy on a different page of the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to rename an existing form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by copying the field to a new name, preserving its properties, and deleting the original.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.title: Clone PDF Form Field to Another Page
clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate an existing form field, change its properties, and place the clone on a different page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-onlostfocus-action-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript OnLostFocus Action to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-onlostfocus-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating or retrieving a NumberField in a PDF form and assigning a JavaScript action that doubles the field's value when the field loses focus.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push button in an existing PDF that posts all form field data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF form that executes JavaScript to clear all user‑entered data and restore default values.

set-calculation-order-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Calculation Order for PDF Form Fields
set-calculation-order-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating numeric form fields, adding a JavaScript calculation to compute a total, and specifying the evaluation order so totals update automatically when input values change.

custom-numeric-field-validation.title: Custom Validation for Numeric PDF Form Field
custom-numeric-field-validation.description: Demonstrates adding a NumberField to a PDF and attaching a JavaScript validation action that restricts the entered value to a specific range.

list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and enumerate all form field names present in the document.

filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.title: Filter PDF Form Fields by Type Using LINQ
filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve all form fields, use a LINQ query to select only TextBoxField objects, optionally set their values, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, configure JSON export options, and export all form fields to a JSON file that describes field types and constraints.

import-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to deserialize a JSON schema and import its AcroForm fields into a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.title: Fill PDF Form Fields and Apply AES‑256 Encryption
fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.description: The example loads a PDF with form fields, sets values for specific text boxes, then encrypts the document using AES‑256 with defined permissions before saving it.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-signature-field.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Signature Field
digitally-sign-pdf-with-signature-field.description: Loads a PDF containing filled form fields, locates or creates a signature field, applies a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, and saves the signed document.

set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.title: Set PDF Metadata After Form Processing
set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with form fields, optionally flattening the form, setting standard document metadata such as author and title, and saving the updated file.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, populating its form fields with supplied values, and returning the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

async-import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Asynchronously Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
async-import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading XFDF form data on a background thread, applying it to the document, and saving the updated PDF using asynchronous methods to avoid blocking the main thread.

parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Parallel Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to fill form fields in multiple PDF documents concurrently with Parallel.ForEach, improving batch processing performance.

log-pdf-form-field-modifications.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications
log-pdf-form-field-modifications.description: The example demonstrates adding a TextBoxField to a PDF, updating its value and visual appearance, and logging each change to a text file for audit and troubleshooting.

generate-csv-report-of-filled-pdf-form-f.title: Generate CSV Report of Filled PDF Form Fields
generate-csv-report-of-filled-pdf-form-f.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, extracts all form fields with their current values, and writes a CSV summary report. It demonstrates batch processing of PDFs and basic form field access using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.title: Compare PDF Form Data and Generate Diff Report
compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF files, compare their form field values using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, and produce both JSON and visual PDF diff reports.

create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.title: Create PDF Template with Form Field Placeholders
create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.description: Shows how to generate a PDF template containing text box and checkbox form fields with placeholder values using Aspose.Pdf.

add-current-date-field-to-pdf.title: Add Current Date Field to PDF
add-current-date-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a DateField form element, set a custom date format, assign the current system date, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-select-listbox.title: Create Multi‑Select ListBox in PDF
create-multi-select-listbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a ListBox form field to a PDF, enable multi‑selection, populate it with options, and pre‑select multiple items using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-combobox-from-db.title: Populate ComboBox Field from Database Values
populate-combobox-from-db.description: Creates a PDF, adds a combo box form field, and fills its options with values retrieved from a simulated database.

add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Signature Field to PDF Form
add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a signature form field, add it to the document's form, and save the updated PDF.

extract-signature-appearance-image.title: Extract Signature Field Appearance as Image
extract-signature-appearance-image.description: Shows how to locate a signature field in a PDF document and extract its visual appearance as a JPEG image for inclusion in audit logs.

set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF TextBox Form Field
set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find a TextBox form field, and limit user input by setting the field's MaxLen property using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-spell-check-for-pdf-text-field.title: Enable Spell Check for PDF Text Field
enable-spell-check-for-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF form with a TextBoxField and enable spell‑checking for that field using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, optionally set a form field value, and save the entire document (including form data) as an XML file for offline data collection.

validate-xml-xsd-fill-pdf-xfa.title: Validate XML against XSD and Fill PDF XFA Form
validate-xml-xsd-fill-pdf-xfa.description: The example validates an incoming XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the filled PDF.

transform-imported-xml-using-an-xslt-sty.title: Transform Imported Xml Using An Xslt Stylesheet Before Populating Pdf Fields With The Result

create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation.title: Create PDF with AcroForm fields and JavaScript calculation
create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing AcroForm text fields for quantity, price, and total, and embed JavaScript that automatically calculates the total as quantity multiplied by price.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through all form fields, extracts their properties and writes them to a CSV file for external analysis.

add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden Session ID Field to PDF
add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden text box form field into an existing PDF to store a session identifier for backend tracking.

set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.title: Set Default Appearance for PDF Form Field
set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to create a text box form field in a PDF and define its default appearance (font, size, and color) using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

export-form-data-http-response.title: Export PDF Form Data to HTTP Response as XML
export-form-data-http-response.description: Creates a PDF with a form field, then streams the exported form data (XFDF) directly to an HTTP response for immediate download.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to download XML form data from a URL, bind it to a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml method, and save the populated PDF.

bulk-fill-pdf-form-skip-missing-fields.title: Bulk Fill PDF Form with JSON and Skip Missing Fields
bulk-fill-pdf-form-skip-missing-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form, importing field values from a JSON file, and gracefully skipping fields that are not present in the JSON while handling errors.

read-xml-with-fallback-to-xmp-pdfa-defau.title: Read XML with Fallback to XMP PDF/A Default Values
read-xml-with-fallback-to-xmp-pdfa-defau.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting XMP PDF/A extension values, and using Aspose.Pdf default constants when the XML nodes are missing or empty.

create-pdf-acroform-taborder.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Custom Tab Order
create-pdf-acroform-taborder.description: Creates a PDF, adds text box form fields, and sets a manual tab order for improved keyboard navigation.

set-dashed-border-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Dashed Border for PDF Form Field
set-dashed-border-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to change a PDF form field's border style to a dashed line using Aspose.Pdf.

set-beveled-border-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Beveled Border for PDF Form Field
set-beveled-border-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, and apply a beveled (three‑dimensional) border style using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to set a background image for a specific XFA form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Indented JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting its form fields, and exporting them to a formatted JSON file with indentation for readability.

import-form-data-from-json-api.title: Import Form Data from JSON API into PDF
import-form-data-from-json-api.description: Shows how to retrieve JSON form data from a REST API and populate an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method, then save the filled PDF.

create-rtl-textbox-field-in-pdf-form.title: Create RTL TextBox Field in PDF Form
create-rtl-textbox-field-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a text box form field that supports right‑to‑left languages (e.g., Arabic) using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

center-align-textbox-field.title: Center Align Text Box Field in PDF
center-align-textbox-field.description: Shows how to locate a text box form field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its horizontal alignment to center, and save the modified document.

create-right-aligned-numeric-text-field.title: Create Right-Aligned Numeric Text Field in PDF
create-right-aligned-numeric-text-field.description: Shows how to add a numeric text field to a PDF document and set its text alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.title: Add Date Picker Field to PDF
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a DateField on a PDF page, attach JavaScript to open the calendar widget when clicked, and save the updated document.

populate-currency-value-in-pdf-form.title: Populate Currency Value in PDF Form Field
populate-currency-value-in-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a RichTextBox form field, and set its FormattedValue to a currency string with symbol and thousand separators.

validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.title: Validate Email Field Before Saving PDF
validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with an email text box, checking that the value contains an '@' character, and saving the document only if the validation passes.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Form Field from a PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a form field by its name, delete the field using Document.Form.Delete, and save the modified document.

insert-form-field-at-specific-index.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
insert-form-field-at-specific-index.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextBox form field, and adding it to the document's Form collection at a specified index for ordered layout.

create-pdf-acroform-open-js.title: Create PDF with AcroForm TextBox and Open-Document JavaScript
create-pdf-acroform-open-js.description: Demonstrates how to add an AcroForm text box field to a PDF and assign a document‑level JavaScript action that runs when the file is opened, then saves the document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-gzip.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Compress with GZip
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-gzip.description: Demonstrates extracting form fields from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, converting them to indented JSON, and compressing the result with GZip for efficient storage or transmission.

import-form-data-from-an-encrypted-xml-f.title: Import Form Data From An Encrypted Xml File After Decrypting It With The Appropriate Key

add-rich-text-box-field-with-html-format.title: Add Rich Text Box Field with HTML Formatting to PDF
add-rich-text-box-field-with-html-format.description: Demonstrates how to create a RichTextBoxField in a PDF and set its FormattedValue using HTML markup to display styled text.

create-acroform-fields-with-tooltips.title: Create AcroForm Fields with Tooltips in PDF
create-acroform-fields-with-tooltips.description: Shows how to add AcroForm text box fields to a PDF and assign tooltips (alternate names) using Aspose.PDF.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to bulk‑update PDF form fields by importing values from a JSON array using Aspose.Pdf's Form.ImportFromJson method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-with-custom-.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML with Custom Root Element
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-with-custom-.description: Shows how to export form fields from a PDF to an XML file and rename the root element to satisfy external system requirements.

add-calculated-total-field-using-javascr.title: Add Calculated Total Field Using JavaScript in PDF Form
add-calculated-total-field-using-javascr.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric fields to a PDF form and create a read‑only total field that automatically sums them using JavaScript.

set-datefield-default-time-on-pdf-load.title: Set DateField Default Time on PDF Load
set-datefield-default-time-on-pdf-load.description: Demonstrates how to add a DateField to a PDF, set its display format to HH:mm:ss, and assign the current system time as the default value when the document is opened.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a Code128 barcode form field, set its value, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-dynamic-barcode.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Barcode Field
create-pdf-with-dynamic-barcode.description: Shows how to generate a unique value at runtime and insert it into a Code128 barcode field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields-before.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Exporting to JSON
validate-required-pdf-form-fields-before.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required contain a non‑empty value, and exports the form data to a JSON file only when validation passes.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count Before Processing
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to load a PDF, check the number of form fields with Document.Form.Count, and abort processing if the count does not match the expected value.

create-pdf-with-acroform-and-margins.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Field and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-and-margins.description: Shows how to set page margins before adding AcroForm fields and create a text box field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

modify-pdf-form-field-value.title: Modify PDF Form Field Value
modify-pdf-form-field-value.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, set its value, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-character-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Character Limit for PDF Form Field
set-character-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to restrict the number of characters that can be entered into a PDF text field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.SetFieldLimit method.

get-character-limit-of-pdf-textbox-field.title: Get Character Limit of a PDF Text Box Field
get-character-limit-of-pdf-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate the 'Address' text box form field, and retrieve its current character limit using the MaxLen property.

add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Checkbox Field to PDF Form
add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a CheckboxField, add it to the document's form, and save the updated PDF.

delete-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific form field named "OldPhoneNumber", and save the modified document.

remove-typewriter-form-elements-page-3.title: Remove Typewriter Form Elements from Page 3
remove-typewriter-form-elements-page-3.description: Loads a PDF, accesses the third page, uses TextFragmentAbsorber to find form XObjects of type 'Typewriter' and clears their text to effectively remove them, then saves the modified document.

clear-form-fields-page-5.title: Clear Form Fields on a Specific PDF Page
clear-form-fields-page-5.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate page 5, collect all widget annotations (form fields) on that page, delete them, and save the modified document.

export-acroform-data-to-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML
export-acroform-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document and saves its AcroForm fields to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's XmlSaveOptions.

import-acroform-data-from-xml.title: Import AcroForm Data from XML into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xml.description: Shows how to load XML‑based form data and import it into a PDF's AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, then save the updated document.

add-submit-button-with-url-action.title: Add Submit Button with URL Action to PDF
add-submit-button-with-url-action.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button in a PDF form, configure its SubmitForm action, and set the destination URL programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-textboxfield-maxlen-truncation.title: Validate TextBoxField Max Length Truncation in PDF Form
validate-textboxfield-maxlen-truncation.description: Demonstrates how to set a maximum character length for a PDF form TextBoxField using Aspose.Pdf, assign a longer string, and verify that the value is automatically truncated to the defined limit.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a TrueType font and set it as the default appearance for every form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-set-comments-field-length.title: Batch Set Maximum Length for Comments Field in PDFs
batch-set-comments-field-length.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, locate a TextBox form field named "Comments", and set its maximum character length to 100 using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-form-field-names-types-max-leng.title: List PDF Form Field Names, Types, and Max Lengths
list-pdf-form-field-names-types-max-leng.description: The example loads multiple PDF files, iterates through each form field, and outputs the field's name, its type, and the character limit for text fields.

modify-add-pdf-form-fields.title: Modify and Add PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
modify-add-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, update an existing text field, add a new text box field to a page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF and Save to Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields with Aspose.Pdf, export the form data to an XFDF (XML) file, and write the file to a UNC network share.

synchronize-xfdf-form-data-across-pdfs.title: Synchronize XFDF Form Data Across Multiple PDFs
synchronize-xfdf-form-data-across-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import XFDF (XML) form data into several PDF documents simultaneously, updating each PDF and saving the synchronized versions.

remove-form-fields-first-page.title: Remove Form Fields from First PDF Page
remove-form-fields-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete all form field widgets on the first page of a PDF, remove their definitions, flatten the page, and save the result as a clean template page.

add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.title: Add PaymentMethod Radio Button Group to PDF
add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' with 'Credit' and 'Debit' options in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-selected-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the default selected option of a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiline-feedback-text-field.title: Add Multiline Feedback Text Field to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a multiline TextBoxField named 'Feedback' with a 500‑character limit to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each form field's name and current value, and write the data to a CSV file for external processing.

populate-pdf-form-from-csv.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from CSV
populate-pdf-form-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV of field names and values, set the corresponding form fields in a PDF, and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field.title: Add Hidden Creation Timestamp Field to PDF
add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden DateField into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to store the document creation timestamp for audit purposes.

set-employeeid-field-readonly.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
set-employeeid-field-readonly.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field named "EmployeeID", and make it read‑only so users cannot modify its value, then save the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields
flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.description: Shows how to flatten all form fields in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting interactive fields into static content so the document becomes non‑editable.

copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.title: Copy Form Fields Between PDFs
copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.description: Shows how to load a source PDF and a destination template, clone each form field from the source, add them to the destination document, and save the merged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-country-dropdown-to-pdf.title: Add Country ComboBox Dropdown to PDF
add-country-dropdown-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a ComboBox field named 'Country' and populate it with a predefined list of country names using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-selected-item-in-pdf-combo-b.title: Set Default Selected Item in PDF Combo Box
set-default-selected-item-in-pdf-combo-b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate the 'Country' combo box form field, set its default selected value to "United States", and save the modified document.

validate-numberfield-non-numeric-input.title: Validate NumberField Rejects Alphabetic Input
validate-numberfield-non-numeric-input.description: Creates a PDF with a NumberField named 'Age', restricts allowed characters to digits, and shows that assigning a non‑numeric value throws an InvalidValueFormatException, confirming input validation.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to strip all JavaScript and action scripts from a PDF, including document‑level, page‑level, and form‑field actions, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-form-field-appearances.title: Export Form Field Appearance Streams to Separate PDFs
export-form-field-appearances.description: Extracts each form field's appearance stream from a PDF and saves it as an individual PDF file for visual inspection.

assign-branding-image-to-pdf-button-fiel.title: Assign Branding Image to PDF Button Field
assign-branding-image-to-pdf-button-fiel.description: Loads a PDF and an image file, then sets the image as the appearance of a button field, supporting both XFA and AcroForm forms, and saves the branded PDF.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data Files
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files and convert each one to an XML form data file while preserving the original file name using Aspose.Pdf.

synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.title: Synchronize PDF Form Data Using XFDF
synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.description: Exports filled form fields from a source PDF to XFDF and imports them into a target PDF, updating the target with the same data.

create-flatten-xfa-form-pdf.title: Create and Flatten XFA Form in PDF
create-flatten-xfa-form-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XFA template, assigning it to a PDF document, optionally setting field values, flattening the XFA form to static content, and saving the resulting PDF.

replace-xfa-with-acroform.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF containing an XFA form, import field definitions from an XML template, convert the XFA to a standard AcroForm, and save the result.

set-tooltip-email-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
set-tooltip-email-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to locate a TextBoxField named "Email" in a PDF and set its tooltip (Contents) to guide users on the required email format, then save the updated document.

highlight-mandatory-text-field-red-borde.title: Highlight Mandatory Text Field with Red Border
highlight-mandatory-text-field-red-borde.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, change its border color to red to indicate a required field, and save the modified document.

add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.title: Add Signature Field with Image Stamp to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.description: Shows how to insert a signature field named 'ClientSignature' into a PDF and set its visual appearance using a predefined image stamp with Aspose.Pdf.

lock-signature-field-after-signing.title: Lock Signature Field After Signing in PDF
lock-signature-field-after-signing.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then set the signature field to read‑only and enforce append‑only changes to prevent further modifications.

hidden-calculation-field-sum.title: Hidden Calculation Field Summing Item1 and Item2
hidden-calculation-field-sum.description: Demonstrates how to add two numeric form fields and a hidden read‑only field that automatically calculates their sum using JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf document.

export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected PDF Form Fields to XML
export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, filter form fields by their fully qualified names, and write the selected field values to an XML document using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xml-subset-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XML Subset into PDF Form Fields
import-xml-subset-into-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with form fields, reading an XML file that contains a subset of field values, and updating matching PDF fields with the XML data.

validate-date-field-format-pdf.title: Validate Date Field Format in PDF with JavaScript
validate-date-field-format-pdf.description: Creates a PDF with a date form field and attaches a JavaScript validation action that enforces the MM/DD/YYYY pattern, alerting the user and clearing the field on invalid input.

set-max-length-for-pdf-password-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Field
set-max-length-for-pdf-password-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a password form field, and enforce a maximum of 20 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-fill-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Fill from JSON
create-pdf-form-fill-json.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with form fields, generating a JSON data file, and populating the form using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-fill-pdf-templates-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Templates from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-templates-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, create a one‑row DataTable for each record, import it into an Aspose.Pdf.Table placed on a template PDF, and save each filled document.

handle-missing-xml-import-when-filling-p.title: Handle Missing XML Import When Filling PDF Form
handle-missing-xml-import-when-filling-p.description: Demonstrates how to safely import XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf while handling missing or malformed XML files to avoid runtime exceptions.

conditional-visibility-pdf-form-field.title: Toggle PDF Form Field Visibility with JavaScript
conditional-visibility-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically show or hide a PDF form field based on another field's value by attaching a JavaScript action to the source field's OnCalculate event using Aspose.Pdf.

multi-page-form-clone.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Cloned Form Fields
multi-page-form-clone.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with multiple pages where each page contains a copy of a form field with a unique name.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields and export the complete form definition to a pretty‑printed JSON schema file.

import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to read a JSON form schema and import its AcroForm fields into a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-checkbox-default-checked.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
set-checkbox-default-checked.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a checkbox form field, and programmatically set its default value to checked using Aspose.Pdf.

add-post-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add POST Submit Button to PDF Form
add-post-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button in a PDF that submits form data using the HTTP POST method with application/x-www-form-urlencoded encoding.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that clears all form fields by executing JavaScript when clicked.

set-export-value-radio-button-option.title: Set Export Value for a Radio Button Option
set-export-value-radio-button-option.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a radio button field, change the export value of a specific option, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Tracking Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.description: Demonstrates generating a GUID at runtime and storing it in a hidden text box form field within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transfer-pdf-form-data-between-documents.title: Transfer PDF Form Data Between Documents
transfer-pdf-form-data-between-documents.description: Shows how to extract filled form fields from a source PDF as JSON, optionally transform the data, and import it into another PDF template.

enable-fitwindow-zoom.title: Enable FitWindow for PDF Zoom
enable-fitwindow-zoom.description: Shows how to set the Document.FitWindow property with Aspose.Pdf so that the PDF viewer automatically zooms to fit the first page when the file is opened.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Submit Button
add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.description: Shows how to set a tooltip (alternate name) on a submit button field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

lock-all-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock All PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only)
lock-all-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set every form field to read‑only, and save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-code128-barcode.title: Create PDF Form with Code128 Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-code128-barcode.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document, add a barcode form field (Code128) using a numeric identifier, and save the file with Aspose.Pdf.

set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-form-attachm.title: Set File Size Limit for PDF Form Attachments
set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-form-attachm.description: Shows how to restrict the maximum size of attached file fields to 2 MB by configuring Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property before loading a PDF.

export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Field Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each form field's name, type and default value, and write the collected metadata to a CSV file for auditing.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Import PDF Form Fields from CSV
import-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV definition file and create corresponding form fields on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting properties like required and read‑only.

add-date-picker-field-default-current-da.title: Add Date Picker Field with Current Date Default
add-date-picker-field-default-current-da.description: Demonstrates how to add a date picker form field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set its default value to the current system date, and specify a display format.

add-date-field-with-validation.title: Add Date Field with Validation to PDF
add-date-field-with-validation.description: Creates a PDF containing a date picker form field and attaches JavaScript that prevents users from entering dates earlier than January 1 2000.

create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.title: Create Dynamic List Box in PDF Form
create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a ListBoxField to a PDF form and dynamically append items to it at runtime using Aspose.Pdf.

set-text-field-background-color.title: Set Text Field Background Color in PDF
set-text-field-background-color.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, change its background color to light gray, and save the updated document.

duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically copy an existing form field, assign each copy a new name, and reposition the copies within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field in a PDF and attach a JavaScript OnValidate action that checks for the presence of an '@' character in the entered email address.

create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.title: Create PDF Tax Calculation Form with Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF form with subtotal, tax rate, and calculated tax amount fields, and attach JavaScript to compute tax automatically.

export-tax-field-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Tax Field from PDF Form to XML
export-tax-field-to-xml.description: Shows how to read a calculated tax value from a filled PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and write it to an XML file for downstream processing.

import-tax-rate-xml-hidden-pdf-field.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into Hidden PDF Form Field
import-tax-rate-xml-hidden-pdf-field.description: Demonstrates reading a tax rate from an XML file and storing it in a hidden text box form field within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-noexport-flag-on-pdf-form-fields.title: Set NoExport Flag on PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-on-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, and set the Exportable property to false so that sensitive field values are excluded from exported data.

pdf-form-language-dropdown.title: Create PDF Form with Language Dropdown and Dynamic Labels
pdf-form-language-dropdown.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with a combo box for language selection and using JavaScript to change other field labels dynamically.

batch-apply-custom-font.title: Batch Apply Custom Font to PDF Text Fields
batch-apply-custom-font.description: Creates sample PDFs with text fields, loads a custom font, and applies that font to all text box fields in each PDF found in the folder.

validate-required-pdf-form-field.title: Validate Required PDF Form Field and Highlight with Red Border
validate-required-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required, apply a red border for visual feedback, and run validation that logs empty required fields using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-qr-code.title: Create PDF Form with QR Code Field
create-pdf-form-qr-code.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form and adding a QR code barcode field populated with data.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code from Text Field in PDF Form
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a TextBoxField so that a BarcodeField (QR code) regenerates automatically whenever the text field value changes.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xsl-report.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Generate Custom Report via XSLT
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xsl-report.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, then apply an XSLT transformation to produce a custom HTML report.

import-xml-data-into-xfa-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into XFA PDF Form
import-xml-data-into-xfa-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF with an XFA form, read transformed XML data, assign it to the form fields, and save the updated PDF.

create-multi-select-listbox-pdf.title: Create PDF with Multi‑Select List Box
create-multi-select-listbox-pdf.description: Shows how to add a list box form field that supports multiple selections to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

multi-select-listbox-max-three.title: Create Multi‑Select List Box with Maximum Three Selections
multi-select-listbox-max-three.description: Shows how to add a list box form field to a PDF that enables multiple selection and limits the user to selecting up to three items using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Address Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a hidden text box form field in a PDF and populate it with a client IP address using JavaScript that runs when the document is opened.

validate-ipv4-address-in-pdf-form.title: Validate IPv4 Address in PDF Form Field
validate-ipv4-address-in-pdf-form.description: Loads a PDF form, reads an IP address field, validates it against an IPv4 regex, and highlights the field with a red border if invalid.

create-pdf-form-digital-signature-valida.title: Create PDF Form with Digital Signature and Validation
create-pdf-form-digital-signature-valida.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a digital signature field, signs it using a PKCS#7 certificate, and then validates the signature.

create-required-signature-field-lock-pdf.title: Create Required Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
create-required-signature-field-lock-pdf.description: Shows how to add a required digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the document using an MDP signature.

export-pdf-signature-info-to-xml.title: Export PDF Signature Information to XML for Audit Logging
export-pdf-signature-info-to-xml.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts details from each signature field, and writes the information to an audit XML file. It also demonstrates saving the entire PDF structure as XML using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-signature-and-sign-pdf-field.title: Import XFDF Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
import-xfdf-signature-and-sign-pdf-field.description: The example loads a PDF, imports field values from an XFDF (XML) file, locates a signature field, applies a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, and saves the signed document.

create-password-protected-pdf-form.title: Create Password Protected PDF Form
create-password-protected-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a password‑masked text box to a PDF form, set its properties, and encrypt the document with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-field-password.title: Set Password for PDF Form Field
set-pdf-form-field-password.description: Shows how to locate a password box field in a PDF form and assign a password value using Aspose.Pdf, with an option to make the field read‑only.

validate-incorrect-password-prevents-acc.title: Validate Incorrect Password Prevents Access to Encrypted PDF Field
validate-incorrect-password-prevents-acc.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a form field, encrypting it with user/owner passwords, and confirming that an incorrect password blocks access to the field's value.

create-pdf-form-auto-backup.title: Create PDF Form with Auto Backup on Field Change
create-pdf-form-auto-backup.description: Shows how to build a PDF form with a text box that executes JavaScript to save a backup copy whenever the field value is modified.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf so the script runs when the field value changes.

export-form-field-appearance-to-json.title: Export Form Field Appearance Settings to JSON
export-form-field-appearance-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields, including their appearance settings, from a PDF document to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-appearance-json.title: Import Form Field Appearance from JSON
import-form-appearance-json.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a form field, writing appearance settings to a JSON file, and importing those settings back into the PDF.

create-collapsible-section-pdf-checkbox.title: Create Collapsible Section in PDF with Checkbox
create-collapsible-section-pdf-checkbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text field, creating a collapsible section in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and JavaScript.

create-collapsed-bookmark-in-pdf.title: Create Collapsed Bookmark in PDF
create-collapsed-bookmark-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a top‑level bookmark to a PDF and setting its initial state to collapsed using Aspose.Pdf.

add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculated Total Field to PDF Form
add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add Quantity and Unit Price fields to a PDF form and use a read‑only Total field with JavaScript to calculate the total price.

export-total-price-to-xml.title: Export Total Price to XML with Aspose.Pdf
export-total-price-to-xml.description: Shows how to calculate a total price, add it as text to a PDF, and export the document to XML while handling GDI+ availability on non‑Windows platforms.

import-discount-rates-xml-pdf-invoice.title: Import Discount Rates from XML and Generate PDF Invoice
import-discount-rates-xml-pdf-invoice.description: The example reads discount rates from an XML file, applies them to a list of items, and creates a PDF invoice with a table showing base price, discount, and final price, plus a grand total.

create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.title: Create PDF Form with PDF‑Only Attachment Field
create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form containing a text box field that uses JavaScript validation to restrict the selected file to PDF format only.

validate-pdf-file-size-before-submission.title: Validate PDF File Size Before Submission
validate-pdf-file-size-before-submission.description: Demonstrates checking that an uploaded PDF does not exceed 5 MB, setting Aspose.Pdf's memory‑loading limit, and safely loading the document for further processing.

add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar to PDF Form Using JavaScript
add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to insert a TextBox field that acts as a progress bar in an existing PDF form and update it with JavaScript actions as the user completes sections.

export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.title: Export PDF Conversion Progress to XML
export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to capture Aspose.Pdf conversion progress events and record them in an XML file, enabling external tracking of a PDF-to-HTML conversion process.

add-locale-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Locale-Based JavaScript to PDF Form
add-locale-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript dictionary for translations in a PDF, update a form field label based on the selected locale, and set a default locale via an OpenAction.

batch-generate-pdf-forms.title: Batch Generate PDF Forms from Template with Data Injection
batch-generate-pdf-forms.description: Creates a PDF form template, then fills it with data from multiple records, saving each filled form as a separate PDF.

export-pdf-interaction-log-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Interaction Log to XFDF
export-pdf-interaction-log-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a submitted PDF form and export its annotations and field values to an XFDF file for server‑side analysis.

import-interaction-log-xml-to-reconstruc.title: Import Interaction Log XML to Reconstruct PDF Viewer State
import-interaction-log-xml-to-reconstruc.description: Shows how to load an XML interaction log into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, optionally import XFDF annotations, and save the reconstructed viewer state as a new PDF.

add-dynamic-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Date/Time Field to PDF
add-dynamic-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a DateField into an existing PDF, set its format to show the current date and time, and save the updated document.

create-read-only-date-field.title: Create Read‑Only Date Field in PDF
create-read-only-date-field.description: Shows how to add a date field to a PDF, set its value to the current date/time, and make the field read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

conditional-pdf-form-section.title: Create Conditional PDF Form Section with Checkbox
conditional-pdf-form-section.description: Shows how to add a checkbox and a text field to a PDF form and use JavaScript to toggle the visibility of the text field based on the checkbox state.

export-conditional-visibility-to-xml.title: Export Conditional Visibility State of PDF Annotations to XML
export-conditional-visibility-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, clears the Hidden flag on all annotations to ensure they are visible, and then saves the document model—including annotation flags—to an XML file to preserve user preferences across sessions.

import-visibility-states-from-xfdf.title: Import Visibility States from XFDF into PDF
import-visibility-states-from-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotation visibility settings from an XFDF (XML) file, and save the updated document.

create-code128-barcode-linked-to-text-fi.title: Create Code128 Barcode Field Linked to a Text Field
create-code128-barcode-linked-to-text-fi.description: Demonstrates how to add a Code128 barcode form field to a PDF and keep it synchronized with a source text field using JavaScript actions.

export-pdf-barcode-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Barcode Fields to XML
export-pdf-barcode-fields-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, extracts values from all barcode form fields, and writes them to an XML file for integration with inventory management systems.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form field values, and serializes them into a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-xml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF containing form fields and export the filled form data to an XFDF (XML) file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an XFDF (XML) file, import matching form field values into the PDF, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, export its form fields as a JSON string, and write the JSON to a text file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-json-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
import-json-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import form field values from a JSON string, and save the populated document.

post-pdf-form-data-xml.title: Post PDF Form Data as XML to Remote Endpoint
post-pdf-form-data-xml.description: Demonstrates extracting form data from a PDF as XML using Aspose.Pdf and sending it via HTTP POST to a remote XML endpoint.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Form
add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF form, append a blank page while preserving all fields, and save the updated document.

add-new-page-with-signature-acroform-fie.title: Add New Page with Signature AcroForm Field to PDF
add-new-page-with-signature-acroform-fie.description: Demonstrates how to append a blank page to an existing PDF and place a signature AcroForm field on that new page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific form field by its name, and save the modified document.

flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF to Remove All Form Fields
flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten it to delete all interactive form fields, and save the resulting plain PDF.

highlight-required-form-fields.title: Highlight Required Form Fields in PDF
highlight-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its AcroForm fields, and set a background color for fields marked as required.

set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.title: Set Font Size and Style of PDF Text Field
set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to modify the font size, color and optionally the style of a text box form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.
